tree.name: Tre Mann
tree.tradeDescription: Hornets traded Gordon Hayward to Thunder for Tre Mann, Vasilije Micic, Davis Bertans, cash, 2024 2nd (HOU own, #42 KJ Simpson), and 2025 2nd (PHI own, #38 Johni Broome). Charlotte also received a trade exception.
tree.note: Florida guard, explosive scorer off the bench

assetsGivenUp.name: Gordon Hayward
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Hornets traded a 2022 2nd round pick (did not convey) to Celtics for Gordon Hayward, a 2023 2nd (BOS own, Trayce Jackson-Davis), and a 2024 2nd (BOS own, Ariel Hukporti). Boston also received a trade exception.
assetsGivenUp.note: Former All-Star forward, signed 4yr/$120M via sign-and-trade from Celtics

assetsGivenUp.name: 2022 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Hornets' own 2022 2nd-round pick, sent to Boston in Hayward S&T. Conditional — did not convey.

assetsGivenUp.name: Trade Exception
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Boston received a $28.5M trade exception as part of the Gordon Hayward sign-and-trade
assetsGivenUp.note: Trade exception generated from Hayward's outgoing salary. BOS used part of it to acquire Daniel Theis from HOU in Feb 2022.
